snp1.1:1.1: The monk who subdues his arisen anger
snp1.1:1.2: as, with herbs, snake-venom once it has spread,
snp1.1:1.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:1.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:2.1: The monk who has cut off passion without leaving a trace,
snp1.1:2.2: as he would, plunging into a lake, a lotus,
snp1.1:2.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:2.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:3.1: The monk who has cut off craving without leaving a trace,
snp1.1:3.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:3.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:4.1: The monk who has uprooted conceit without leaving a trace,
snp1.1:4.2: as a great flood, a very weak bridge made of reeds,
snp1.1:4.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:4.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:5.1: The monk seeing in states of becoming no essence,
snp1.1:5.2: as he would, when examining fig trees, no flowers,
snp1.1:5.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:5.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:6.1: The monk with no inner anger,
snp1.1:6.2: who has thus gone beyond becoming & not-,
snp1.1:6.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:6.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:7.1: The monk whose discursive thoughts are dispersed,
snp1.1:7.2: well-dealt with inside without leaving a trace,
snp1.1:7.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:7.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:8.1: The monk who hasn’t slipped past or held back,
snp1.1:8.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:8.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:9.1: The monk who hasn’t slipped past or held back,
snp1.1:9.2: knowing with regard to the world that “All this is unreal,”
snp1.1:9.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:9.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:10.1: The monk who hasn’t slipped past or held back,
snp1.1:10.2: without greed, as “All this is unreal,”
snp1.1:10.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:10.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:12.1: The monk who hasn’t slipped past or held back,
snp1.1:12.2: without aversion, as “All this is unreal,”
snp1.1:12.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:12.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:13.1: The monk who hasn’t slipped past or turned back,
snp1.1:13.2: without delusion, as “All this is unreal,”
snp1.1:13.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:13.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:14.2: there are no obsessions —the roots of unskillfulness totally destroyed—
snp1.1:14.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:14.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:15.2: there’s nothing born of disturbance that would lead him back to this shore,
snp1.1:15.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:15.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:16.2: there’s nothing born of the underbrush that would act as a cause for binding him to becoming,
snp1.1:16.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:16.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
snp1.1:17.1: The monk who’s abandoned five hindrances,
snp1.1:17.2: who, untroubled, de-arrowed, has crossed over doubt,
snp1.1:17.3: sloughs off the near shore & far—
snp1.1:17.4: as a snake, its decrepit old skin.
